creator: @quebert
executive_summary: A MIXED macro regime with Fear at 28, rising yields at 4.558%, and gold at record $4,510 supports a barbell of high-conviction AI and healthcare catalyst picks (GILD #1 on FDA approval, PLTR and AVGO+TSM for semiconductor AI infrastructure) anchored by a 15% materials hedge in GLD and NEM to defend against persistent inflation. The 13-pick moderate portfolio respects all correlation group hard limits, caps at 10% per position, and prioritizes scaling into overbought markets over 2-3 sessions with GILD, GLD, and PLTR as the three core conviction positions totaling 27% of deployed capital.

macro_environment.summary: MIXED regime with SPY at highs (RSI=71.1, technically overbought) while Fear & Greed sits at 28 (Fear), a divergence that flags stretched momentum against deteriorating sentiment; rising 10Y yields at 4.558% and Brent crude confirmed at $103.94 with gold at record $4,510 signal persistent inflation and real-asset demand.
key_factors: SPY RSI=71.1 overbought while F&G=28 Fear — momentum diverging from sentiment creates selective entry opportunities in quality oversold names rather than broad market chasing
10Y yield at 4.558% rising trend compresses high-multiple growth valuations (PLTR fpe=66, ASML fpe=34) and makes PEG<1 names like AVGO and PYPL structurally more attractive
Gold at $4,510 record and Brent at $103.94 confirm MIXED regime inflation tailwind; materials allocation is required ballast, not optional hedge

cross_sector_insights.insight: AI semiconductor cycle remains the dominant structural driver with AVGO PEG=0.90 and TSM PEG=1.28 both at fair RSI entries while NVIDIA posted record Q1 revenues confirming sustained wafer demand
cross_sector_insights.implication: Max-2 semiconductor allocation (AVGO+TSM) is fully justified; cut ASML despite bullish news given RSI=68 overextended entry

cross_sector_insights.insight: Healthcare bifurcation widening: GILD accelerated FDA approval removes binary risk and creates near-term momentum while REGN faces Dupixent biosimilar overhang despite Parabilis diversification
cross_sector_insights.implication: GILD ranked #1 on catalyst clarity; REGN retained as updated thesis at RSI=31 oversold but sized conservatively at 7%

cross_sector_insights.insight: F&G Fear at 28 combined with extreme RSI oversold in PYPL (RSI=12) and REGN (RSI=31) creates asymmetric mean-reversion setups that historically outperform when SPY is not in downtrend
cross_sector_insights.implication: Scale into oversold names over 2-3 sessions given overbought SPY (RSI=71.1); do not chase at full size on day one

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Gilead Sciences
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Accelerated FDA HDV approval removes the largest near-term binary risk and is an immediate revenue catalyst, while the $5B Tubulis ADC oncology acquisition adds a pipeline that diversifies beyond HIV at a fair RSI=54 entry.
key_news: GILD Stock Jumps After Winning Accelerated FDA Approval For HDV Treatment
Gilead Sciences completes Tubulis acquisition for $5bn
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: FDA accelerated HDV approval converts a binary risk into a confirmed revenue driver while Tubulis adds an antibody-drug conjugate platform that could become a $2B+ oncology segment by 2029; at fpe=14.0 and PEG=2.14, Gilead is meaningfully cheaper than its biotech peers with a cleaner catalyst stack.
thesis_invalidators: FDA rescinds or restricts HDV accelerated approval following confirmatory trial failure
EMA/EU regulatory divergence blocks European HDV launch beyond 2027

financial_health.health_note: Piotroski=8 and Altman safe zone confirm balance sheet strength capable of absorbing the $5B Tubulis acquisition without credit risk.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: SPDR Gold Shares
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: MIXED regime confirmed, F&G=28 Fear, rising yields, and gold at record $4,510 make GLD the highest-conviction non-correlated ballast in the portfolio; previous active thesis at -1.1% with zero invalidators triggered.
key_news: Gold confirmed at $4,510 — record level driven by central bank accumulation and inflation hedge demand
Rising 10Y yield at 4.558% has not suppressed gold, confirming structural demand shift
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Goldo resilience at $4,510 despite rising real yields confirms a structural regime shift in central bank reserve allocation away from Treasuries; MIXED macro regime with VIX=16.7 and Fear at 28 historically produces the best gold risk-adjusted returns.
thesis_invalidators: Fed restarts rate hike cycle targeting >5.5%
Fear & Greed Index rises above 65

financial_health.health_note: ETF structure — no balance sheet metrics applicable; backed by physical gold bullion.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Palantir Technologies
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI=36 pullback to fair entry with $184 analyst target and active thesis intact at +1.6%; AIP is the only deployed enterprise AI platform with classified-clearance capability — a structural moat no competitor can replicate quickly.
key_news: Salesforce, Other Software Stocks Are Scraping Themselves Off the Floor
Palo Alto Networks Is Beating Palantir by 60% This Year
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: PLTR's AIP platform operates in a category of one for classified-clearance enterprise AI deployments; RSI=36 consolidation provides a technically sound re-entry while the AI/defense spending cycle is structurally accelerating.
thesis_invalidators: US government AI budget cuts exceed 20%
Commercial revenue growth decelerates below 30% YoY for two consecutive quarters

financial_health.health_note: Cash-rich, zero-debt balance sheet in safe Altman zone; Piotroski=7 strong supports the high fpe=66 premium.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Newmont Corporation
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Gold at $4,510 generates exceptional NEM margins and the buyback program is highly accretive at current prices; RSI=49 fair entry with $144 analyst target and Piotroski=9 maximum quality score.
key_news: Gina Rinehart Invests $97 Million in US Defense Stocks — gold sector capital flows remain elevated
Is Aura Minerals Positioned for Stronger GEO Growth in 2026?
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: At gold spot $4,510 versus NEM all-in sustaining costs of ~$1,400/oz, the company generates over $3,100/oz operating margin — among the highest in its history; the buyback program at $107 is materially accretive.
thesis_invalidators: Gold spot falls below $3,800/oz sustained for 30+ consecutive days
Operational cost overruns drive AISC above $1,700/oz in two consecutive quarters

financial_health.health_note: Maximum Piotroski=9 reflects exceptional financial quality; safe Altman zone.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Broadcom Inc.
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: PEG=0.90 makes AVGO the best-valued AI infrastructure semiconductor at fair RSI=49 entry; custom ASIC demand from hyperscalers provides predictable revenue.
key_news: A Once-in-a-Generation Opportunity: 5 AI Stocks Primed for Growth
Broadcom Rides on Accelerating Semiconductor Revenues
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: AVGO's custom AI ASIC partnerships with Google and Meta provide multi-year contracted visibility; PEG=0.90 is the lowest in the semiconductor group, making it the most attractive risk-adjusted entry in the AI infrastructure buildout.
thesis_invalidators: Top-2 AI chip customers reduce ASIC orders by more than 30%
VMware integration charges materially exceed guidance for two consecutive quarters

financial_health.health_note: Piotroski=8 strong with safe Altman zone; elevated but manageable leverage from VMware acquisition.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Taiwan Semiconductor
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: NVIDIA record Q1 revenues directly confirm sustained N3/N2 wafer demand flowing to TSM; RSI=51 fair entry with strong buy $468 target and Piotroski=9.
key_news: Buy These ETFs as NVIDIA Posts Record Q1 Revenues
SMH vs SOXX: Which Semiconductor ETF Should You Buy in 2026?
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: TSM's monopoly on sub-3nm node manufacturing makes it irreplaceable in the AI compute buildout; Arizona fab ramp reduces geopolitical risk premium while near-term demand from NVIDIA, Apple, and AMD remains at record levels.
thesis_invalidators: China military escalation triggers US sanctions forcing customer diversification
NVIDIA revenue guidance miss signals AI capex slowdown reducing wafer orders by >20%

financial_health.health_note: Maximum Piotroski=9; no US 10-K (ADR), balance sheet publicly confirmed strong.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Updated thesis with Parabilis $2.32B oncology deal diversifies away from Dupixent dependence at RSI=31 near oversold; strong buy $833 target represents 30%+ upside.
key_news: Jim Cramer on Regeneron: There Could Be Some More Downgrades
ATS 2026: Mixed results for Sanofi/Regeneron itepekimab COPD prospects
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Parabilis acquisition replaces the invalidated melanoma thesis with next-generation antibody engineering; at fpe=11.9 with $2B+ annual FCF, REGN is materially undervalued versus biotech peers and RSI=31 provides a technically sound entry.
thesis_invalidators: Dupixent biosimilar receives FDA approval before 2028
Parabilis Phase 1 oncology milestone failure across two or more programs

financial_health.health_note: Safe Altman zone but Piotroski=4 neutral reflects near-term cash deployment from Parabilis acquisition; monitor FCF recovery.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Exxon Mobil
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Brent confirmed at $103.94 with uptrend intact generates exceptional XOM cash flow supporting $35B+ buybacks; good RSI=53 entry with $168 analyst target.
key_news: More Gas Per Barrel of Oil: A Growth Lever for Permian Operators
Egypt to ship Cypriot gas to Europe in QatarEnergy deal
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: At Brent $103.94, XOM generates FCF that exceeds its entire annual capex program; the Permian gas-per-barrel growth lever and European LNG demand via QatarEnergy deal add incremental revenue not priced into consensus.
thesis_invalidators: Brent crude falls below $75/bbl sustained for 30+ consecutive days
Permian production guidance cut by more than 10%

financial_health.health_note: Safe Altman zone with investment-grade balance sheet; Piotroski=5 neutral reflects commodity-cycle earnings variability.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: PayPal Holdings
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI=12 extreme oversold combined with fpe=7.7 and PEG=0.80 represents one of the most historically asymmetric mean-reversion setups in large-cap fintech; Burry institutional accumulation provides a floor.
key_news: American Express vs. PayPal: Which Fintech Stock Has More Upside?
Should You Forget PayPal and Buy Visa Instead?
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: At fpe=7.7 and PEG=0.80, PYPL trades at a 50%+ discount to comparable payments peers; RSI=12 indicates capitulation selling, not fundamental deterioration, and institutional accumulation by value managers confirms the market is pricing in an irrationally severe bear case.
thesis_invalidators: Apple Pay BNPL market share acceleration beyond 15% of total checkout volume
Consumer credit delinquency spike prompts management to cut payment volume guidance

financial_health.health_note: Financial company — Altman Z not applicable; Piotroski=8 strong confirms healthy operating fundamentals despite depressed stock price.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Amazon.com
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI=43 fair entry with strong buy $313 analyst target; AWS AI infrastructure momentum confirmed and Vuzix smart glasses integration signals ambient computing positioning.

S&P 500 Posts Eighth Consecutive Weekly Gain

thesis_invalidators: AWS revenue growth decelerates below 15% for two consecutive quarters
FTC antitrust action forces marketplace structural separation

financial_health.health_note: Safe Altman zone with strong and accelerating FCF; Piotroski=5 neutral reflects reinvestment-cycle suppression of near-term profit metrics.

Should Visa & Mastercard Investors Worry About UK & Europe Moves?

thesis_invalidators: US consumer credit delinquency rises above 3.5%
Brazil and UK regulatory actions mandate interchange fee caps

financial_health.health_note: Financial company — Altman Z not applicable; Piotroski=8 strong reflects consistent earnings quality and disciplined capital returns.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: The Walt Disney Company
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Good RSI=53 entry with strong buy $129 target; Canada 15% streaming content mandate structurally favors IP-rich platforms like Disney+ over pure-play streamers.
key_news: Canada Raises Streaming Content Requirement to 15% for Netflix, Disney, Amazon
Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Rebounds To Highs
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Disney's dual-revenue model of Parks + Streaming is structurally recovering while regulatory content mandates in Canada and Europe favor IP-rich platforms; at fpe=13.7, the stock is meaningfully below historical multiples with Parks segment optionality not fully priced in.
thesis_invalidators: Streaming subscriber growth misses below 3% QoQ for two consecutive quarters
Global economic slowdown drives Parks segment revenue decline greater than 15%

financial_health.health_note: Gray Altman zone reflects elevated leverage from content and Parks capex; Piotroski=8 strong mitigates concern.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Salesforce
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: PEG=0.96 offers enterprise AI growth at an attractive price with earnings catalyst in ~5 days; Agentforce platform positions CRM ahead of the enterprise AI automation wave.

S&P 500 Posts Eighth Consecutive Weekly Gain
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Agentforce positions Salesforce to monetize the enterprise AI automation cycle at scale across its 150,000+ customer base; PEG=0.96 means current AI monetization optionality is essentially free relative to base CRM business growth.
thesis_invalidators: Agentforce fails to accelerate total revenue growth above 10% YoY
